title: The Sickener
content:
{{Top|leg|notoc=1}} {{Location |image= |name=The Sickener |created=By [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' places the beginning of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] in the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]. Furthermore, ''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact]]'' portrays the [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commandos]] of [[Omega Squad]] as having been trained at The Sickener before and active at the opening of the Clone Wars; therefore, The Sickener must have been created by 22 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]. |destroyed= |type= |location=[[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]]{{CSWECite|III|150|Sickener}} |terrain= |fauna= |flora= |interest= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact]]'' **[[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] }} {{Quote|I'm not proud of what I did to you.''"
"''You crawled through the nerf guts first, Sarge. It looked like so much fun that we followed you in. And then you threw up.|Kal Skirata and clone commando [[Fi Skirata|RC-8015]]|''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]''}} '''The Sickener''' was a training facility used by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army]] on the [[Extragalactic/Legends|extra-galactic]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]] that was used in [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commando]] training by [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]. The Sickener earned its name by requiring aspiring [[Commando/Legends|commandos]] to crawl, wade, or slither through a huge field of trenches filled with the rotting entrails of animals such as [[Nerf/Legends|nerfs]] and other decaying matter in order to prepare for combat scenarios. The [[Clone trooper/Legends|cloned soldiers]] were reminded by their [[Instructor/Legends|instructors]] that the course was nothing compared to the horrors of actual warfare. To prove [[Gender/Legends|he]] would not order his commandos—including the men of [[Omega Squad]]—to endure any hardship he himself was incapable of, [[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] [[Kal Skirata]] of the ''[[Cuy'val Dar]]'' endured The Sickener, the seasoned [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] vomiting in the process before his [[Trooper/Legends|troops]], thereby earning their trust and respect. ==Behind the scenes== The Sickener was first mentioned in the [[2004]] novel ''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact]]'', written by [[Karen Traviss]]. ==Appearances== *''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact]]'' {{1stm}} *''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]'' {{Mo}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Sickener, The}} [[Category:Galactic Republic locations]] [[Category:Kamino locations]]
